# SchoolSafetyReport
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
df <- read_csv("data/schoolsafetyreport.csv")
```

```{r}
ggplot(df, aes(x = `Borough Name`)) + 
  geom_bar(color = "blue", fill = "blue") 
```

```{r}
ggplot(df, aes(x = `Borough Name`, fill = factor(`# Schools`))) + 
  geom_bar(position = "dodge")
```


```{r}
ggplot(df, aes(fill = `Borough Name`, x = factor(`# Schools`))) + 
  geom_bar(position = "dodge") 
```



```{r}
ggplot(df, aes(x = `AvgOfVio N`, y = `AvgOfNoCrim N`)) + 
  geom_point() +
  geom_jitter()
```
